caption: The video opens with a serene and expansive outdoor scene, featuring two large white tents set against a backdrop of a cloudy sky. The tents, which appear to be part of a temporary settlement or camp, are situated in a vast, open field with sparse vegetation. The atmosphere is calm and somewhat somber, with the overcast sky adding a sense of tranquility and reflection. A quote appears on the screen, reading, "We always come from somewhere, what is impressive, is the story," suggesting a narrative that delves into the origins and journeys of individuals associated with this setting. The scene remains static, allowing viewers to absorb the peaceful yet poignant environment, hinting at deeper stories and experiences connected to this place.
